data.text: u1 (scout) rushes cp-west for a likely-uncontested capture. u2 (harvester) runs rn-west -> ms-supply (cp-center) for the 10pt deliver mission. u3 (defender) stages near cp-center/rn-west, ready to reinforce delivery, help hold cp-center once captured, or pivot toward contesting cp-east/ms-outpost depending on red's moves.

Heading toward cp-west (3,8) to attempt an uncontested capture - it's not tied to either mission so red may not prioritize it. u2: suggest gather rn-west (0,5) and haul to ms-supply at cp-center (6,5), our biggest guaranteed reward (10). u3: hold near cp-center/rn-west this turn, redirect once we see red's opening moves - possibly push to contest ms-outpost at cp-east (9,2) later if we want to deny red's home-turf hold mission. Will report if red beats me to cp-west.
Copy, heading to rn-west (0,5) to gather, then hauling to cp-center for ms-supply. Moving to (0,1) this turn, will reach the node in ~2 more turns.

Moving to (1,2) this turn - it's roughly equidistant (8) from all three control points and close to rn-west, so I stay flexible until we see red's opening. Will commit next turn: likely swing to cp-center to guard u2's delivery run, or push toward cp-east if red looks slow to contest ms-outpost.
Red-1 secures cp-east for hold mission. Red-2 handles rn-east -> cp-center delivery. Red-3 supports logistics/defense.
Heading to cp-east [9, 2] to start the hold mission. Red-2, gather at rn-east [11, 4] and deliver to cp-center [6, 5]. Red-3, assist with delivery or secure cp-center.
Acknowledged. Moving toward rn-east [11, 4] to gather. Will deliver to cp-center once full.
Acknowledged. Advancing toward cp-center [6, 5] to secure the point and support the supply delivery. I'll coordinate with Red-2 on the relay and watch for blue interference.

Focus blue on the deliver mission (ms-supply @ cp-center) via blue-2 gathering from rn-west, with blue-1 and blue-3 converging on cp-center to contest/hold it; cede the cp-east hold mission (favors red's spawn) and opportunistically grab cp-west if uncontested.

Distances are symmetric-ish but red's scout/units sit ~2 closer to every CP (6 vs our 8), so we won't win a solo footrace to any point. I'm pushing toward cp-center (6,5) to contest it and back up ms-supply delivery there. blue-2: head to rn-west (0,5), gather, then run resources to cp-center for ms-supply (6 needed, reward 10) — that's a marathon not a race, we're even with red on that. blue-3: escort blue-2 toward cp-center or swing to cp-west (3,8) to grab an uncontested point since red likely commits to cp-east for the hold mission (ms-outpost, closer to their spawn). Let's not chase cp-east — bad trade for us.
Copy, heading to rn-west now. At (0,1), moving to (0,3) this turn, will reach (0,5) next turn and start gathering. Will haul toward cp-center for ms-supply after that.

Agreed, heading to cp-west (3,8) — it's the one point where red isn't closer than us, so first-mover wins it uncontested while they likely split toward cp-center/cp-east. Moving (1,2)->(2,3) this turn, will keep closing the gap. No combat mechanic exists so once I'm sole occupant for 2 turns it's ours — will hold once I arrive.
red-1 secures cp-east [9, 2] for ms-outpost. red-2 gathers rn-east and delivers to cp-center [6, 5] for ms-supply. red-3 provides cover/defense.

I'm moving to rn-east [11, 4] to gather resources. red-1, please head to cp-east [9, 2] to start the hold mission. red-3, support red-1 or secure cp-center [6, 5] for deliveries. I'll bring resources to cp-center once my carry is full.

Acknowledged. I'm moving to [10, 5] to approach cp-east. red-1, please head to [9, 4] this turn so we can alternate occupying cp-east [9, 2] for the hold streak. red-2, proceed to rn-east and deliver to cp-center when full.
blue-u1 rushes cp-east to claim ms-outpost; blue-u2 shuttles rn-west resources to cp-center for ms-supply; blue-u3 defends cp-center and contests cp-west.

Scout rushing cp-east (9,2) for ms-outpost hold mission - I'm closer than red's scout (dist 5 vs 6). ETA turn 3, then need ~5 turns holding uncontested. blue-2: focus rn-west gather -> deliver at cp-center for ms-supply. blue-3: cover cp-center or swing toward cp-west/cp-east to block red reinforcements.
Moving to rn-west (0,5) now, will gather next turn then haul to cp-center for ms-supply. Full load (3) takes ~2 trips to hit amount 6.

Moving toward cp-center (6,5) — red-2/red-3 are both at (10,5), only 2 turns from cp-center, so they could contest it before blue-2's delivery lands. I'll take up position there to hold/defend it. Will divert to cp-west if red doesn't press center.
Focus on ms-outpost (cp-east) and ms-supply (cp-center). red-2 handles resources. red-3 & I secure points.
Plan: red-2 gather rn-east & deliver to cp-center for ms-supply. red-3 secure cp-center. I will secure cp-east for ms-outpost. Coordinate to avoid blocking.
Acknowledged. Moving to rn-east [11, 4] to gather. Will deliver to cp-center [6, 5]. red-3, please move to cp-center to start the hold streak.
Acknowledged. Moving to [8, 5] to approach cp-center. Will hold there next turn to start the capture streak.
blue-1 secures cp-east for ms-outpost hold; blue-2 harvests rn-west and delivers to cp-center for ms-supply; blue-3 defends cp-center/harvester route.

Racing to cp-east (9,2) to contest ms-outpost before red-1 gets there. blue-2: keep gathering rn-west, deliver to cp-center for ms-supply. blue-3: hold/contest cp-center or escort blue-2, watch for red-3 pushing from (8,5).
At rn-west now, gathering. Will shuttle loads to cp-center for ms-supply.
Red-3 is only 2 away from cp-center (8,5)->(6,5), closer than me. Moving (4,3)->(6,3) to contest cp-center next turn and screen blue-2's delivery route.
Secure cp-east [9,2] for ms-outpost hold mission. red-u3 supports hold. red-u2 gathers rn-east and delivers to center [6,5] for ms-supply.
Moving to cp-east [9,2] to start the hold mission. red-u3, follow to support/relieve me. red-u2, gather at rn-east and deliver to center [6,5] for the supply mission.
Acknowledged. Gathering at rn-east [11,4] this turn. I'll head to cp-center [6,5] immediately after to complete the supply mission. I'll sync with red-u3 for support/defense as needed.
Acknowledged. Moving to [9, 4] to support red-u1 at cp-east next turn. I'll secure the point against blue-u1.
blue-1 holds/denies cp-east, blue-3 controls cp-center, blue-2 delivers to ms-supply.

Contesting cp-east with red-u1 — holding here denies their outpost mission and capture since neither of us has sole occupancy. blue-3, secure cp-center; blue-2, keep hauling to complete ms-supply. I'll hold this standoff unless red reinforces or leaves.
Loaded 3/3 from rn-west, moving toward cp-center to deliver for ms-supply. ETA ~3 turns.
Moving onto cp-center now to start the capture clock and guard the delivery spot for blue-2's ms-supply drop-off.
red-u1 holds cp-east for ms-outpost (requires 5 turns total). red-u2 delivers current load to ms-supply. red-u3 gathers rn-east and delivers to ms-supply.
Holding cp-east [9, 2] for ms-outpost. red-u2: path to [6, 5] to deliver your 3 resources. red-u3: gather at rn-east [11, 4] and bring to [6, 5] for ms-supply.
Moving to [9, 4] towards cp-center [6, 5] to deliver. red-3, proceed to rn-east [11, 4] to gather. red-1, maintain hold on cp-east.
Moving to rn-east [11, 4] to gather 1 resource for ms-supply. red-2, clear [9, 4] for your path.
blue-u1 pins cp-east in a stalemate to deny ms-outpost to red; blue-3 finishes capturing cp-center; blue-2 delivers its full load to complete ms-supply; revisit cp-west once supply is delivered.

Standoff with red-1 at cp-east (9,2) — holding to deny their outpost capture since neither side can capture while contested. Keep pushing deliver at center and center capture; cp-west (3,8) is wide open if anyone can spare a trip.
Carrying 3/3 from rn-west, en route to ms-supply at cp-center (6,5) - 2 turns out. Will loop back for more after delivery.
Holding cp-center (6,5) for 2nd consecutive turn — capturing it now. Staying put to guard the spot for blue-2's supply delivery in ~2 turns.
red-u2 delivers at center; red-u1 holds cp-east; red-u3 contests/guards cp-center to secure supply mission.
Moving to [7,4] to deliver 3 resources at center. Red-u1, hold cp-east for outpost mission. Red-u3, head to center to contest or guard.
Acknowledged. Moving to [9,4] toward center to contest cp-center and guard the delivery point.
Contain cp-east with blue-u1 to deny red's hold mission; blue-u2 finishes delivering at cp-center; blue-u3 guards cp-center/deliver point and reinforces east if freed up.

Holding cp-east (9,2) — tied with red scout, denies their sole occupancy so ms-outpost can't progress for them either. blue-2 keep delivering to cp-center, blue-3 hold cp-center for the deliver mission square; if you can spare a reinforcement to cp-east that'd let us flip it since red-3 is only 2 away.

En route to cp-center with 3/3 cargo, arriving this turn — will deliver next turn. Can't spare for cp-east, I'm too slow (move 2) and it's 8 tiles away; that's a job for blue-1 or a redirected defender, not me.

Staying put at cp-center (6,5) — red-2 is only 2 tiles out (7,4) and looks like it's beelining for the same delivery square, so I want blue presence here to protect blue-2's delivery next turn and keep our capture secure. I'm move-2 and cp-east is 6 tiles away — 3 turns to get there, same problem blue-2 flagged. blue-1, your tie at cp-east is already doing the job (denies red's sole occupancy, so ms-outpost can't tick for them either) — hold that line, don't need to force a flip yet.
red-3: move to [9, 2] to secure cp-east with red-1. red-1: hold [9, 2].
Confirmed. Moving to [9, 2] to secure cp-east. red-2: deliver at [6, 5]. red-1: hold [9, 2].
blue-1 denies cp-east by holding; blue-2 delivers cargo and keeps cycling rn-west/rn-east into ms-supply; blue-3 moves to capture cp-west uncontested. Re-evaluate if red abandons cp-east.

Holding cp-east — contested 1v2 vs red scout+defender, denies their outpost hold mission for free since occupancy is shared. blue-2: deliver your 3 now at cp-center. blue-3: consider pushing to cp-west (unowned, uncontested) to grab a third point while I tie up two red units here.
Delivering 3 now at cp-center — that puts team resources at 3/6 for ms-supply. Heading back to rn-west after to refill; will need another full load plus change to close the mission.

Moving out from cp-center toward cp-west (3 turns, defender move=2) per blue-1's call — no red units are near cp-west so it's a safe free grab. cp-center ownership is sticky (only flips on 2 consecutive turns of sole enemy occupancy), and red-2 is carrying like blue-2 so it'll likely cycle back to refill too — low capture risk. blue-2: if red-2 camps alone at cp-center for 2+ turns after you leave, flag it and I'll turn back.
red-2 delivers at cp-center. red-3 holds cp-east. red-1 gathers rn-east and relays to cp-center.
red-2: Deliver your 3 resources at cp-center [6,5] next turn. red-3: Hold cp-east [9,2] to secure the outpost mission. I will advance to rn-east [11,4] to gather and shuttle resources.

Delivering 3 resources at cp-center now. I will head to rn-west [0,5] next to gather 3 more and finish the supply mission. red-3, maintain hold on cp-east [9,2] for the outpost mission. red-1, coordinate shuttle runs from rn-east.
Acknowledged. Holding cp-east [9,2] to secure the outpost mission. red-2, proceed with delivery. red-1, coordinate shuttles from rn-east. I will maintain control here.

blue-2 keep gathering/delivering at cp-center toward ms-supply (6 needed); blue-3 hold/defend cp-center against red-2 contest; blue-1 (me) pins cp-east contested indefinitely to deny ms-outpost to red unless we commit a second unit to actually flip it.

Holding cp-east (9,2) — contested with red-3, denying their outpost hold-mission clock for free. Not worth abandoning since red would start capturing in 2 turns. Focus resources on ms-supply at cp-center; send blue-3 here only if we actually want cp-east ourselves, otherwise this stalemate favors us.

Heading to rn-west (0,5) to fill up (carry 3) for ms-supply — red's harvester is parked on cp-center too so continuing to hold there is contested anyway. ETA node in 2 more turns, then back to deliver. cp-center ownership should stick from our earlier capture even while contested.

Moving blue-u3 onto cp-center now — once blue-2 leaves for rn-west, red-2 would get sole occupancy and start flipping our capture. I'll sit on cp-center to keep it contested until blue-2 gets back to deliver, then we can reassess whether to push cp-west instead.
Priority: Complete ms-supply (deliver 6 to [6,5]). I will gather at rn-east and deliver. red-2 gathers rn-west. red-3 secures cp-east.

Moving to rn-east [11,4] to gather. I'll shuttle resources to [6,5] for the deliver mission. red-2, head to rn-west [0,5] to gather and deliver. red-3, maintain pressure on cp-east [9,2]; if blue-1 leaves, hold it for the outpost mission.
Holding cp-east [9,2] to contest. I'll secure the outpost mission as soon as blue-1 disengages. Will maintain pressure here.
Deny ms-outpost by contesting cp-east indefinitely (blue-1). Hold cp-center against red-2 (blue-3). Harvester (blue-2) cycles rn-west -> cp-center to hit ms-supply's 6 resources.

Parked on cp-east with red-3 — contested, so their ms-outpost hold (worth 8) can't progress. Staying put to block. blue-2: rn-west is closer (dist 4) than rn-east from your spot, gather there and shuttle to cp-center for ms-supply. blue-3: keep holding cp-center against red-2, ownership stays ours while contested.
Heading to rn-west (dist 4 from me), moving to (2,5) this turn then gather next turn. Will shuttle to cp-center for ms-supply after.

Holding cp-center against red-2 to keep it contested, ownership stays blue since we already had it. blue-2: once you gather at rn-west, come straight to (6,5) to deliver ms-supply — I'll keep the square occupied for you.
Priority: ms-supply (6 resources). Red-1 & Red-2 gather from rn-east/rn-west and deliver to cp-center. Red-3 secures cp-east for ms-outpost once clear.

Gathering at rn-east. Will deliver to cp-center next turn. Red-2: head to rn-east/rn-west, gather, and deliver to cp-center. Red-3: hold cp-east if blue-u1 vacates, otherwise reposition to support supply run.
Heading to rn-west via [4, 5]. Will gather and deliver to cp-center. Red-3, keep holding cp-east.
Holding cp-east at [9, 2] to contest blue-u1 and secure ms-outpost. Will maintain position until blue vacates or orders change. Good luck with supply runs.

blue-3 completes cp-center capture and stays to build ms-supply delivery point; blue-2 shuttles resources from rn-west to cp-center; blue-1 (me) holds cp-east to deny red's outpost mission via stalemate contest, re-evaluating if red reinforces or withdraws.

Holding cp-east (9,2) — red-3 is also here so it's contested, denying their ms-outpost (reward 8). I'll sit on it as long as red-3 stays; too far from a node to gather efficiently anyway. blue-3: finish the cp-center capture (1/2 already) then start banking toward ms-supply. blue-2: keep cycling rn-west -> cp-center, we're at 3/6 resources.
Moving to rn-west (0,5) now, will gather next turn then run back to cp-center to deliver toward ms-supply.
Holding cp-center for the 2nd turn to lock the capture. After that I will stay here to build the ms-supply hold/deliver support, or push to defend if red approaches.
Prioritize ms-supply: red-1 delivers current resource, red-2 gathers rn-west and delivers. Once supply complete, shift to ms-outpost by securing cp-east.

Moving to [8, 4] to reach deliver point [6, 5] in 2 turns. red-2, gather at rn-west [0, 5] and bring 3 resources to [6, 5] to complete ms-supply. red-3, contest cp-east [9, 2] and hold once blue-1 leaves.
Acknowledged. Moving to [2, 5] to reach rn-west [0, 5] next turn. Will gather 3 and deliver to [6, 5] to complete ms-supply.
Holding cp-east [9, 2]. Will capture once blue-u1 leaves. red-1, good luck delivering. red-2, gather and deliver to complete ms-supply.

Blue-3 anchors cp-center (secures ms-supply deliver point). Blue-2 gathers 3 at rn-west, delivers to cp-center to complete ms-supply (reward 10). Blue-1 contests cp-east against red-u3 to deny ms-outpost (reward 8) — reassess and redeploy to cp-west if red reinforces east.

Holding cp-east — contested with red-u3, denies their ms-outpost hold streak (no combat, so my scout mobility (mv3) lets me redeploy fast if needed). Blue-2: gather full 3 at rn-west then run to cp-center [6,5] to finish ms-supply (exactly your carry, reward 10). Blue-3: keep holding cp-center to secure the delivery point. I'll stay pinned here unless red brings a second unit, then I'll peel off to cp-west instead.
At rn-west now, gathering to fill 3 carry. Will head to cp-center next turn to deliver into ms-supply.

Holding cp-center as ordered — it's also the ms-supply deliver square, so I'm guarding blue-2's delivery. cp-center already shows blue owned with a 2-turn streak; no red units nearby to contest. Will stay put unless red pushes toward (6,5).
Focus on ms-supply first. red-u1 delivers 1. red-u2 gathers rn-west. red-u3 secures cp-east.
Moving to deliver at cp-center. red-2: gather rn-west and bring resources to cp-center. red-3: hold cp-east to secure outpost mission.
Acknowledged. Moving to rn-west to gather, then heading to cp-center to deliver.
Acknowledged. Holding cp-east to secure the outpost mission. I will maintain position to build the hold streak.
blue-1 holds cp-east to deny red's outpost hold-mission; blue-2 hauls its full load to cp-center to finish ms-supply (3+3=6); blue-3 keeps cp-center contested.

Holding cp-east — I'm contesting red-3's defender there, denying ms-outpost (reward 8) as long as I stay. blue-2: you're full at 3/3, team resources are 3/6 for ms-supply — deliver at cp-center (6,5), that completes it immediately. blue-3: keep contesting cp-center against red-1.
Moving toward cp-center with my 3 resources, ETA ~2 more turns from (0,5). Will deliver as soon as I arrive to close ms-supply.
Holding cp-center at (6,5), staying on red-1's square to deny sole occupancy — they can't flip ownership while I'm parked here. blue-2: come on in and deliver, I'm not moving.
Focus on ms-supply (need 3 more) and ms-outpost (hold cp-east). red-2 gathers/delivers, red-3 holds east, red-1 delivers and assists.
Delivering 1 to center. red-2, gather at rn-west and bring to center to complete ms-supply. red-3, hold cp-east for ms-outpost. I'll move to support after delivery.
Gathering at rn-west. Will deliver to center to finish ms-supply.
Holding cp-east for ms-outpost. I'll maintain position and secure the point once blue-u1 vacates. Acknowledged plan.

blue-3 anchors cp-center and escorts blue-2's delivery to close ms-supply before red's harvester arrives; blue-1 (scout) camps cp-east in a permanent stalemate with red-3 to deny ms-outpost, since sole occupancy is impossible while contested.

Holding cp-east — I'm stacked with red-3 so neither of us can capture it, which denies their ms-outpost (reward 8) for free. blue-2: you're 2 moves from cp-center vs red's harvester's 3 — push the delivery, we clinch ms-supply first. blue-3: red-1 just moved onto cp-center to contest it, hold your ground there.
Confirmed, pushing to cp-center with my full load (3). Moving to [4,5] this turn, [6,5] next turn to deliver — that alone completes ms-supply (3+3=6).
Holding cp-center against red-1 - as long as I stay, they cannot get sole occupancy to flip it, and it stays clear for blue-2 to deliver. blue-2: come on in, I will not block your delivery.
Secure cp-east for the hold mission. red-u2 will deliver resources to complete the supply mission.
Moving to reinforce cp-east. red-u2 proceed to deliver at cp-center. red-u3 hold cp-east.
Acknowledged. I'm moving toward cp-center to deliver my load and finish ms-supply. Keep holding cp-east for the outpost mission.
Holding cp-east to contest blue-u1. red-1, avoid stacking on cp-east; focus on cp-center or rn-east. red-2, proceed to deliver.

Deny cp-east to red by contesting with blue-u1 (stalemate blocks their hold-mission progress). blue-2 delivers to finish ms-supply (10 pts). blue-3 continues holding cp-center. Re-evaluate if red reinforces cp-east or pulls back.

Holding cp-east/ms-outpost — red-3 is here too, so it's contested and denied to them. Staying to block their mission progress. blue-2: deliver the 3 you're carrying at cp-center once you arrive, that completes ms-supply (6/6). blue-3: keep holding cp-center.
Moving to cp-center now (dist 2, exactly my move). Will deliver next turn to hit 6/6 on ms-supply.
Holding cp-center, staying put so blue-2 can deliver here next turn for ms-supply.
Priority: Secure cp-east [9,2] for ms-outpost (hold 3 turns). red-1 & red-3 will hold cp-east. red-2 delivers to cp-center to finish ms-supply.
Moving to cp-east [9,2] to reinforce red-3 for the hold mission. red-2, proceed to cp-center [6,5] to deliver your resources and complete ms-supply. We'll contest blue-1 at the outpost.
Moving to [4,5] toward cp-center. I'll deliver my 3 resources next turn to complete ms-supply (team will reach 7/6). red-1, good luck securing cp-east with red-3.
Holding [9,2] to contest blue-1 and initiate the cp-east hold streak. red-1, coordinate arrival to secure the point. red-2, proceed with delivery at cp-center.
Blue-2 delivers to close ms-supply then resumes gathering; blue-3 anchors cp-center against red's nearby harvester; blue-1 holds cp-east to deny red's outpost mission/CP capture.

Holding cp-east contested (me + red-1 + red-3) — denies their outpost hold-mission and CP capture. Blue-2: deliver now (3 carried + 3 banked = 6, closes ms-supply). Blue-3: stay on cp-center, red's harvester at (4,5) is only 2 away and could contest it if we leave.
Delivering now at cp-center: 3 carried + 3 banked = 6, ms-supply complete this turn.
Holding cp-center to guard blue-2's delivery and block red-2's harvester from contesting. Will reassess once ms-supply completes.
Secure cp-east for ms-outpost (8pts) while red-u2 completes ms-supply (10pts). Contest blue at center if possible later.
Holding cp-east [9,2] to contest blue-u1 and secure ms-outpost. red-u2, move to [6,5] and deliver to finish ms-supply. red-u3, hold with me.
Moving to [6,5] to deliver. Will complete ms-supply next turn.
Confirming hold at cp-east [9,2] with red-1 to contest and secure ms-outpost. red-2, proceed to [6,5] to deliver and complete ms-supply.

ms-supply complete (10pts banked). blue-u1 camps cp-east to deny red the outpost hold mission indefinitely (contested = no capture for either side). blue-3 pushes to claim unclaimed cp-west. blue-2 keeps farming rn-east for resources.

cp-east contested: red-u1 (scout) + red-3 (defender) are parked here with me, so ms-outpost stays blocked for everyone as long as I hold — denying their 8pt mission for free. blue-3: cp-west (3,8) is unclaimed and empty, worth swinging over to capture. blue-2: ms-supply is done but keep gathering at rn-east (8 remaining, closer) for resource score.
Heading to rn-east (11,4) to keep gathering since ms-supply is already delivered — will reach in ~3 turns and start hauling for resource score.

Holding cp-center instead of dashing to cp-west: blue-2 is vacating this turn and red-u2 is sitting right here with 3 cargo, so if I leave too, red-u2 becomes sole occupant and starts a capture-flip on a point we already own. Cp-west is empty and unclaimed — it'll still be there in a turn or two, or blue-1's scout (move 3) can swing over faster once cp-east denial isn't needed. I'll reassess once red-u2 moves off center.
Secure cp-east for ms-outpost mission. All units hold/reinforce [9,2].
Holding cp-east to secure ms-outpost. red-u3, hold with me. red-u2, move to [9,2] ASAP to reinforce.
Delivering at center now to secure resources. Will move to cp-east next turn to reinforce the hold.
Holding cp-east with red-1 to secure ms-outpost. red-2, proceed with delivery; we'll maintain the hold until you arrive.
blue-u1 blocks cp-east indefinitely to deny ms-outpost to red; blue-u3 holds cp-center; blue-u2 keeps gathering/delivering for resource score.

Holding cp-east (9,2) — red-1 and red-3 are both here too, so it's contested and neither side can get sole occupancy. I'll sit tight to deny their outpost hold mission. Supply mission's already done; keep gathering/delivering for score if useful.
Supply's done; heading to rn-east (11,4) to keep banking resources for score since I'm too slow to help contest cp-east. 2 turns out, then I'll gather/deliver on repeat.

Red-2 (harvester) is parked on cp-center with me right now — supply's done so it's not delivering toward anything new, but if I move off, they get sole occupancy and could flip our ownership in 2 turns. Holding here to deny that.
red-3 captures cp-east [9,2] for ms-outpost. red-1 provides perimeter cover at [11,2]. red-2 supports from center.
Moving to [11,2] to clear cp-east. red-3, hold [9,2] sole-occupant to capture ms-outpost. red-2, avoid cp-east.
Moving to [4,5] to approach rn-west. I will gather resources and relay them if needed. Avoiding cp-east as instructed.
Holding [9,2] to capture cp-east and complete ms-outpost. red-1, ensure blue-1 does not contest. red-2, stay away from cp-east to maintain sole occupancy.
Deny ms-outpost by contesting cp-east indefinitely; secure cp-center capture with blue-3; blue-2 gathers remaining resources for control-point scoring.

Holding cp-east contested against red-3's defender — denies their ms-outpost hold mission since we already banked ms-supply. blue-3 stay on cp-center to lock the capture, blue-2 keep gathering rn-east.
Moving to rn-east (11,4) to gather, 8 remaining there. Will shuttle back to cp-center to bank more resources.
Holding cp-center, ms-supply already banked. Keeping this locked down while blue-1 contests cp-east hold mission.
Secure cp-east for ms-outpost at cp-east. red-u1 & red-3 hold [9, 2]. red-2 gathers resources.
Moving to [9, 2] to secure cp-east for ms-outpost. red-3, hold position. red-2, head toward rn-west [0, 5] to gather.
Moving to [2, 5] toward rn-west. Will gather next turn and deliver at cp-center.

Holding [9,2] as ordered. I will maintain position to contest cp-east for ms-outpost. Noting blue-u1 is currently on the same square; if they leave, I'll start the hold streak. red-1, coordinate your arrival to ensure sole occupancy.

Deny ms-outpost by parking blue-u1 at cp-east indefinitely (contested = no capture for either side). Redirect blue-3 from cp-center to cp-west to claim the uncontested third CP. blue-2 continues harvest/deliver loop between rn-east and cp-center for bonus resources.
